instruction: In ship2, add the missing local dev script so `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173` works, without changing the existing UI or test/build behavior.

steps.description: Add the missing local development npm script by updating the root package manifest so `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173` invokes Vite's dev server, while leaving existing build, test, lint, and UI source files unchanged.
